detection.notes: No strong deterministic line structure detected

routing.notes: Text-like content with weak or no deterministic pattern

family_info.notes: Direct free-form text lane from free_text_log

records.evidence_text: SPUTTER DEPOSITION TOOL - PVD_03; Shift Log | Date: 13-Apr-2026 | Shift: Night (2200-0600); Logged by: S. Muthu (Shift Supervisor)
Previous shift noted intermittent arc events on TiN target (target age: 87%).
PM shift cleared arcs, no further action taken. | 2200h - PVD_03 handed over from PM shift.

supporting_observations.evidence_text: 2200h - PVD_03 handed over from PM shift.

extra.context: Lot loaded onto equipment for processing.

records.evidence_text: 2225h - W001 base pressure reached 3.8e-6 Pa. Within spec.
Dep params: Ar flow = 30 sccm, N2 flow = 10 sccm, DC power = 3000 W, temp = 250 degC
Film thickness (in-situ): 520 A. Target: 500 A +/- 30 A. PASS.
2252h - Arc event detected on TiN target during W003 dep. System auto-suppressed. Arc count this session: 1.

extra.session_context: Arc count reported for this session

records.evidence_text: DC power dipped from 3000 W to 2750 W for ~2s then recovered.

extra.likely associated_with: arc event on TiN target during W003 deposition

extra.note: Followed by thickness measurement and pass disposition.

records.evidence_text: Thickness: 485 A. Marginally low but within tolerance.
Second arc event during pump-down phase. Arc count: 2.
Lot LOT_0080 put on hold at W004. | Notified on-call engineer (Eng. Priya R.) at 2304h.

supporting_observations.evidence_text: Notified on-call engineer (Eng. Priya R.) at 2304h.

records.evidence_text: 2303h - Third arc event. Arc count: 3. Arc frequency threshold (3 arcs in 30 min) reached.
Target surface shows micro-nodule formation consistent with late-life arcing.

extra.decision_context: following inspection and observed target degradation

records.evidence_text: 2330h - Target replacement started. Old target removed (serial: TGT_TiN_0044, age: 87%, arc count: 412 lifetime).
Break-in: 30 min at 30% power, 30 min at 60% power, 10 min at 100% power.
Sputter rate verified: 52 A/min (target: 50 +/- 5 A/min). OK.
0117h - W004 dep started with new target. No arcs.
0128h - Subsequent wafers W005 through W025 processed without incident.
Total target arc events this shift: 3 (all on old target)
W003: borderline thickness flagged for review (485 A)
W001 to W003: PASS (old target, pre-replacement); W004 to W025: PASS (new target)
LOT_0080 unloaded and staged for next step.
0550h - Shift handover notes written. AM shift engineer Lim K.H. briefed at 0558h.
